## Summary

Describe the change in 1-3 concise bullets.

## Scope

- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Content / SEO
- [ ] Data / locale behavior
- [ ] Build / deployment
- [ ] Tests / tooling
- [ ] Documentation

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build` or `npm run build:fast`
- [ ] Manual browser check
